privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Exercise your privacy rights and manage the use of your data.
privacy.settings-privacy-text: Click 'Edit' to change your privacy settings and exercise your privacy rights through our request form.
privacy.page-title: Exercising rights related to personal data
privacy.privacy-desc-one: You can exercise the privacy rights granted to you under local law. In the 'Data Subject Request Form' tab, you can send a request to Milliy-turizm.uz, which will be forwarded to our privacy department. If your request relates to a taxi or car booking, you may also receive a response from LLC 'Milliy Turizm', as these services are provided jointly with this company.
privacy.privacy-desc-link-one: Milliy turizm yagona platformasi Privacy Policy, LLC 'Milliy Turizm' Privacy Policy for car bookings
privacy.which-to-use: Which of the following rights would you like to exercise?
privacy.right-to-access-text: The right to obtain a copy of your personal data.
privacy.right-to-edit-text: The right to have your personal data deleted from our system.
privacy.right-to-delete: Right to unsubscribe from email newsletters
privacy.right-to-delete-text: Manage your subscription to our emails.
privacy.right-to-object: Right to object to data sharing with other companies in the Milliy Turizm Group.
privacy.right-to-object-text: The right to object to data sharing with other companies in the Milliy Turizm Group.
privacy.sent-request-text: An email with further instructions for processing your request has been sent to { email }. If you do not have access to this address, please email us at dataprotectionoffice@milliyturizm.uz

intro.paragraph1: This Privacy Policy explains how Unified National Tourism Platform ("we", "our", "us") collects, uses, discloses, and protects your personal data when you use our tourism platform, website, and related services (collectively, the "Services").
intro.paragraph2: Our platform allows users to plan travel to Uzbekistan by booking hotels, purchasing flight, train, and bus tickets, and finding tour guides and related travel services.
intro.paragraph3: By using our Services, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

personalInfo.title: 2.1 Personal Information You Provide
personalInfo.dob: Date of birth (where required for ticketing)

bookingInfo.title: 2.2 Booking and Travel Information
bookingInfo.ticketDetails: Flight, train, and bus ticket details

autoCollected.title: 2.3 Automatically Collected Information
autoCollected.pages: Pages visited and actions taken on the platform

thirdParty.title: 2.4 Information from Third Parties
thirdParty.airlines: Airlines, railway operators, and bus companies

sharing.title: 5. Sharing and Disclosure of Information
sharing.intro: We may share your information with:
sharing.hotels: Hotels, airlines, railway and bus operators
sharing.tourGuides: Licensed tour guides and travel agencies
sharing.itServices: IT service providers and hosting partners
sharing.government: Government or regulatory authorities when required by law
sharing.noSell: We do not sell your personal data.

internationalTransfers.title: 6. International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.description: Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside your country of residence, including Uzbekistan. We take appropriate measures to protect your personal data.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.description: We use cookies and similar technologies to enable platform functionality, remember preferences, analyze usage, and improve marketing efforts. You can manage cookies through your browser settings.

dataRetention.title: 8. Data Retention
dataRetention.description: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill service obligations, comply with legal requirements, and resolve disputes. Data is then securely deleted or anonymized.

dataSecurity.title: 9. Data Security
dataSecurity.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data. However, no system can be guaranteed to be completely secure.

yourRights.title: 10. Your Rights
yourRights.contact: To exercise your rights, contact us at [privacy@yourdomain.com].

thirdPartyLinks.title: 11. Third-Party Links
thirdPartyLinks.description: Our Services may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.

childrenPrivacy.title: 12. Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.description: Our Services are not intended for children under 18. If we become aware that we have collected data from a minor, we will delete it.

changes.title: 13. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

footer.copyright: © 2025. National Tourism Unified Platform. All rights reserved.

booking.title: Reservations
booking.approximate-price-note: This is an approximate price calculated in UZS. You will pay in USD or UZS. On the day of payment, the exchange rate may be different.
booking.enter_data_in_latin: Please enter all your details in Latin letters.
booking.foreign-currency-fee-notice: Please note that the bank that issued your card may charge a fee for transactions in foreign currency.
booking.includes-taxes-and-fees: Includes taxes and fees in the amount of
booking.date-must-differ: The days cannot be the same
booking.free-date: Good news - your dates are available! Check your new stay dates below
booking.finish-select: Your accommodation period has been successfully changed to the selected dates
booking.select-date: Select the dates you want to change, then we will check the database for existing options
booking.busy-date: Unfortunately, there are no suitable accommodations for the selected dates, try choosing other dates
booking.can-see-messages: You can see other messages in your account messages
booking.have-questions: Still have questions? Write to the owner
booking.we-response: We will respond to you by email as soon as possible.
booking.no-booking: Information about your trips will appear here.
booking.no-booking-text: If you have made a booking but do not see it here, you can add it manually using your confirmation number and PIN.
booking.cencelling-reason: Select a reason for canceling your reservation
booking.cencelled-booking: The reservation has been successfully canceled!
booking.cancelling-booking-text: After cancellation, you must book again and go through all the steps again
booking.prepayment-required: Breakfast is included in this price
booking.description: Here you can see a list of reservations
booking.step-1-description: Please provide all your details in Latin letters as in your passport so that the hotel can understand them
booking.step-2: How do you want to guarantee your reservation?'
booking.step-2-description: Payment from the card will not be charged. Your card details are only needed to guarantee your reservation
booking.logged-in-as: You are logged into your account as:
booking.enter-required-fields: Almost done! Just fill in the required fields
booking.only-latin-characters: Please provide all your details in Latin letters as in your passport so that the hotel can understand them
booking.error-occurred: Looks like you forgot something. Please fill out these fields to continue:
booking.email-will-be-used-for-communication: your email address to continue booking
booking.additional-info-description-1: Flexibility: you can cancel your reservation for free until January 19, 2024, so don't miss out on this great price.
booking.additional-info-description-2: No payment required today. You pay at the property.
booking.delete-room-text: Are you sure you want to delete this hotel room option for your reservation?
booking.tell-your-special-requests-description: The property cannot guarantee that special requests will be accommodated but will do its best. You can always leave a special request after completing your booking!
booking.your-special-requests: Please write your requests in Uzbek or English (optional)
booking.your-arrival-time-description: Your room will be ready for check-in at 2:00 p.m.
booking.your-arrival-correct-time-description: Your room will be ready for check-in at {time}
booking.your-arrival-time-description-2: 24-hour front desk - ready to help you at any time!
booking.estimated-time: Please indicate your estimated time of arrival (Local time in Tashkent)
booking.how-feature-works: What are the conditions for my booking?
booking.free-cancellation: No prepayment required - you pay during your stay
booking.free-cancel-desc: You can cancel your reservation free of charge until 00:00 on the day of arrival. You will be charged the cost of the first night if you cancel after 00:00 on the day of arrival. In case of no-show, the no-show fee will be equal to the cancellation fee.
booking.children-conditions-desc-1: Children of any age are allowed.
booking.children-conditions-desc-2: Children 13 years of age and older will be charged the same as adults at this property.
booking.children-conditions-desc-3: This price is for the number of adults you selected in your search. If you are traveling with children, please enter the number of children to see exact prices and availability information.
booking.children-conditions-desc-4: Additional services are not automatically included in the total price and must be paid separately during your stay.
booking.children-conditions-desc-6: All cribs and extra beds are subject to availability.
booking.dont-have-a-card: I do not have a card
booking.add-card-to-account: Add this card to your account to make new bookings faster in the future
booking.dont-have-you-a-card: You do not have a card?
booking.dont-have-you-a-card-title: Can I make a reservation without a credit card?
booking.dont-have-you-a-card-desc: A valid card is required to guarantee your reservation. We offer a number of options that do not require a card to guarantee your stay. You can also place an order using someone else's card if you have the permission of its owner. In this case, please indicate the owner's name in the Special Requests field and make a note indicating that you have been given permission to use the card.
booking.confirm-receive-letters: I agree to receive Milliy turizm yagona platformasi marketing communications, including letters about special offers, rewards, travel products, and Milliy turizm yagona platformasi products and services
booking.here-details: Here are the details of your reservation
booking.booking-success-text: Your reservation has been confirmed. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
booking.i-prefer-adjacent-rooms: I want rooms next to each other (if possible)
booking.success-text: Thank you for taking the time to let us know what's going on. Reports like yours help us stay safe and secure.
booking.final-price: The final price shown is the amount you pay to the property.
booking.final-price-text: National Tourism does not charge guests any booking fees or any other charges. The property may charge a foreign currency transaction fee when paying.
booking.payment-info-text: All payments are processed by the accommodation facility {hotel_name}. The following forms of payment are available: {payments}
booking.additional-text: Please note: Additional amenities (such as an extra bed) are not included in this total price. The price on our website does not include taxes, which the property may still charge if applicable.
booking.meal: Meals are not included in the price of this room.
booking.will-send-email: * A booking confirmation will be sent to this address
booking.check-code-desc: Please enter the code that was sent to your email address
booking.check-code-desc-email: Please enter the code that was sent to your email adress
booking.check-code-desc-telegram: Please enter the code that was sent to your telegram
booking.check-booking-modal-desc: You can check the status of your booking by filling in the fields below
booking.booking-confirmed: Your booking at {name} hotel has been successfully confirmed.
booking.special-request-text: The hotel team will do its best to accommodate your requests. Our front desk will carefully review these requests and strive to fulfill them to the best of our ability.
booking.additional-notes:
If you have any additional questions, feel free to contact us. We look forward to welcoming you!

Best regards, {name} team
booking.special-wishes: Tell us about your special wishes
booking.special-wishes-desc: The accommodation facility administration cannot guarantee the fulfillment of special wishes, but will do everything possible for this. You can always leave a special wish after completing your booking!
booking.request-optional: Please write your requests in English or Russian (optional)
booking.only-letters: Allows only Latin letters and spaces.
booking.enter-data-in-latin: Please enter all information in Latin letters.

my-properties.title: My objects
my-properties.prices-and-calendar-desc: At this stage, you can customize your hosting plans
my-properties.choose-option: Choose the option that is convenient for you to block your object
my-properties.pick-date: Specify the start and end date of the blocking
my-properties.choose-reason: Please state the reason why you do not want to receive guests.
my-properties.delete-object-text: Are you sure you want to delete this object?
my-properties.delete-object-text-2: After deleting the object, all data will be lost and it will be impossible to restore it
my-properties.here-is-about: Information about your objects will appear here
my-properties.add-for-get-guest: Add your property to Milliy turizm yagona platformasi and get ready to receive guests!
my-properties.add-properties-get-guests-title: Add your property and get ready to receive guests!
my-properties.add-properties-get-guests-text: Next are the objects that are registered in your name in the Unified Cadastral Center
my-properties.howcalls-property: What is the name of your object?
my-properties.suggest1-title: What to consider when choosing a name for an object?
my-properties.suggest1-text1: Try to come up with a short name that is easy to remember
my-properties.suggest2-title: Why do I need to name my object something?
my-properties.suggest2-text1: This name will be the title of your page on our site. It should reflect your property, the services you provide, or contain location information. The title will be visible to all visitors to our site, so do not include your address.
my-properties.suggest3-title: What should be included in the address?
my-properties.suggest3-text1: Indicate the street and house number
my-properties.suggest3-text2: Please provide floor or apartment number if applicable.
my-properties.suggest3-text5: The physical address of the property, not your work or home address
my-properties.suggest4-text1: Once a guest makes a reservation, we will provide them with this address. It is needed so that the guest can find your property, so make sure that the address is correct.
my-properties.suggest8-title: Advice from Milliy turizm yagona platformasi
my-properties.suggest8-text1: Before you register your property on Milliy turizm yagona platformasi, ​​please read the important information
my-properties.address-property-desc: We may send a paper letter to this address to confirm the location of your property. For this reason, the address must be entered correctly - it will be difficult to change it later.
my-properties.location-property-desc: Mark the location of your property on the map
my-properties.select-street-num-home: Enter the street and house number (in Latin letters)
my-properties.about-placement-desc2: What can guests use at your property?
my-properties.suggest5-title: What if my guest policies change?
my-properties.suggest5-text1: You can easily customize them later and add other rules in the “House Policies” section after you complete your property registration
my-properties.what-floor: What floor is your property on?
my-properties.how-many-floors: Number of floors in the building
my-properties.breakfast: Do you offer breakfast to guests?
my-properties.how-looks: What does your object look like?
my-properties.suggest6-title: What if I don't have professional photos?
my-properties.suggest6-text1: 'It's OK! Use photos taken with a smartphone or digital camera. Here are some photography tips'
my-properties.how-looks-desc: Upload at least 5 photos of your property. The more photos you add, the higher your chances of getting bookings. You can upload even more photos later.
my-properties.upload-photo-desc: Acceptable formats: jpg, jpeg, png. The size of each file must be no more than 10 MB.
my-properties.suggest7-title: What if I am not sure about the price?
my-properties.suggest7-text1: Don't worry: you can change it later and even set rates for weekends, midweeks and certain seasons to better control your earnings.
my-properties.price-for-guests: What price do you want to set per night?
my-properties.price-for-guests-desc-4: Save time - bookings are confirmed automatically
my-properties.price-for-guests-desc-5: We advertise your property on Google and Yandex
my-properties.discounted-price-desc-2: Offer a discount on your first 3 bookings or within 90 days (whichever comes first).
my-properties.cancellation-policy-description: With a predefined cancellation policy, your chances of attracting clients are 90% higher than with free cancellation up to 30 days before check-in
my-properties.guests-cancelling-reservation: Reservations can be canceled free of charge no later than 1 day before arrival.
my-properties.guests-cancelling-reservation-24-hours: Guests who cancel their reservation within 24 hours of making it will be automatically waived the penalty.
my-properties.discounted-price-description: With lower prices for small groups, your chances of getting bookings are 12% higher
my-properties.free-cancellation: How many days before check-in can your guest cancel their reservation free of charge?
my-properties.free-cancellation-description: Guests value freedom of action, which is why rates with free cancellation are most often chosen on our website. Allow travelers to cancel up to 5 days before check-in and get your first booking faster.
my-properties.protection-booking-description: To help you spend time processing random bookings, we automatically waive the penalty for guests who cancel their booking within 24 hours of making it.
my-properties.recommendations-sizes-discounts: Offer lower rates for groups of less than 2 people to make your property more attractive to potential guests.
my-properties.recommendations-sizes-discounts-descript: Discount recommendations are based on data from properties similar to yours. You can change the discount amount at any time
my-properties.ready-to-guests: From what date are you ready to receive guests?
my-properties.allow-long-term: Do you want to allow people to stay with you for more than 30 nights?
my-properties.allow-long-term-description: Allow travelers to stay with you for up to 90 nights. This way you can get more bookings and attract guests who work remotely
my-properties.legacy-completion-description: Ready! You have done everything necessary to start welcoming your first guests
my-properties.legacy-completion-1: Can I decide when to receive guests?
my-properties.legacy-completion-1-description: Yes. To do this, make sure that the information in the calendar is up to date. Close any dates for which you do not want to receive bookings. If you have bookings from other sites for certain days, please close these dates in our calendar
my-properties.legacy-completion-2-description: Yes. They are confirmed immediately after the guest has made a reservation.
my-properties.legacy-completion-3: Can I decide who can stay at my property?
my-properties.legacy-completion-3-description: No. If a date is open in your calendar, anyone on our site can book a stay for that day
my-properties.legacy-completion-4: I confirm that this is a legal property with all necessary licenses, which I can provide upon request. Milliy-turizm.uz reserves the right to verify any details of this registration
my-properties.legacy-completion-5: I accept the general terms of service
my-properties.cancel-reason-description: Is there any reason why you don't want to open your property to bookings just yet?
my-properties.cancel-reason-1: The property is not ready to receive guests
my-properties.cancel-reason-2: I want to connect a channel manager
my-properties.cancel-reason-3: I want to update my calendar
my-properties.cancel-reason-4: I want to add more information (photos, amenities and services, prices, etc.)
my-properties.cancel-reason-placeholder: Example: the ad states that the entire property is for rent, but in reality it is a separate room.
my-properties.cancel-required: Please select at least one reason
my-properties.success-description: Congratulations! Your property has been successfully published to start welcoming guests.
my-properties.no-data-desc: There are no objects registered in your name in the cadastral center
my-properties.deactive-object: Are you sure you want to deactivate this object?
my-properties.deactive-object-text: After deactivating an object, it will not be displayed on the site
my-properties.activate-text: Choose the option that is convenient for you to activate your property.
my-properties.confirm-active-text: Your property has been successfully activated
my-properties.confirm-deactive-text: Your property has been successfully deactivated
my-properties.search-text: Search for the guest's F.I.O. ID Number, or Phone Number
my-properties.info-guest-desc: Add the necessary guest settings to add them to the reservation
my-properties.commercial-yes: Yes, I will use it for commercial purposes
my-properties.commercial-no: No, I will not use it for commercial purposes

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.confirm-delete: Are you sure you want to remove your review from {place}?

join-us.title: Welcome to our rental family!
join-us.subtitle: Join our platform and make your accommodation available to tourists. Create a partnership like Airbnb and start an adventure without words, become part of our hospitable family.

download.title: National tourism: Your personal guide to the world of adventure!
download.subtitle:
Download our app now and get closer to incredible adventures! 
Hotel, ticket, car, tour - everything is in your pocket.

main.intro-title: The wonders of Uzbekistan, just a click away
main.transport-title: We will take care of your transport
main.guides-title: Discover Uzbekistan with the best guides
main.intro-subtitle:
Discover, plan, and book. 
Welcome to our all-in-one portal for exploring Uzbekistan!
main.three-steps-title: {count} simple steps to your perfect trip
main.three-steps-subtitle: Effortless planning - we’ve got it all covered.
main.three-steps-first-subtitle: Register on our website to start your journey. Enter your name, email address and password to create an account.
main.three-steps-second-subtitle: Select your desired accommodation location and indicate the dates of your stay. View available options and add them to cart.
main.three-steps-third-subtitle: Proceed to your shopping cart to check and confirm your selection. Select your preferred payment method and complete your booking. Done, your journey has officially started!
main.guide-subtitle-1: Find a fun itinerary that matches your interests, whether it's a historical walk or a food tour.
main.guide-subtitle-2: Book a tour in advance to ensure your spot and a convenient time for travel.
main.guide-subtitle-3: Get familiar with the route, pack essentials (comfortable shoes, water, camera) and be prepared for a new experience.
main.guide-subtitle-4: Soak up the atmosphere, listen to your guide, ask questions and make the most of your new experience.
main.four-steps-subtitle-1: Take a trip and discover your dream destination, where adventure and relaxation await.
main.four-steps-subtitle-2: Ensure your comfortable travel by booking tickets to your desired destination through our platform.
main.four-steps-subtitle-3: We offer various payment methods to make the booking process simple and convenient.
main.four-steps-subtitle-4: Discover the unique attractions, culture and atmosphere of your chosen destination.
main.hotels-subtitle: Simplify your travel plans - we make it easy!
main.apartments-title: Homes most appreciated by our guests.
main.apartments-subtitle: We offer a large variety of accommodation options for your perfect stay
main.reviews-title: What do tourists think about us?
main.client_count: {count, plural, one {# client} few {# clients} many {# clients} other {# clients}}
main.share-this-news-description: If you liked the article or found it useful, share it with your friends on social networks.
main.hotels-cta: Find the perfect hotel for your trip
main.payment-desc: Prepayment is charged when booking a tour
main.free-booking: Canceling up to {value} days before the start date of the tour is free. If cancelled in the following days, cancellation is paid.
main.food-included-price: This price includes 3 meals a day
main.train-title: Choose a route that suits your trip
main.plane-title: Find a suitable flight for your flight
main.holly-tourism-success: Your request has been received, we will contact you shortly
